part1.activity: Create an account.
Skip Tutorial Island
Open the minigames tab in the adventures screen to locate Balthazar Beauregard's Big Top Bonanza. When you reach the circus, complete the agility minigame to unlock Surge and Escape.
Talk to Challenge Mistress Fara and skip all of the basic challenges.
Obtain the Dwarven army axe by speaking to Major Mary Rancour
Obtain the wicked hood from Tam McGrubor.
Teleport to the Burthorpe lodestone.
part1.notes: To make things easier in future steps, fulfil the following whilst in burthorpe:

part1.activity: Activate the Taverley lodestone.
Sail to Daemonheim.
Talk to the Fremennik shipmaster 1 to sail to Al Kharid.
Activate the Al Kharid lodestone.

part1.notes: Unlocks the transfigure, sacrifice, and devotion abilities.

part1.activity: Activate the Lumbridge lodestone.

Head east to the Archaeology Guild

Travel to Anachronia on The Stormbreaker.
Complete a run of Herby Werby.

part1.activity: Unlock the Command Skeleton Warrior talent from the Talent tree.
